name: COSTCO WHOLESALE CORP /NEW
summary: Costco Wholesale Corp operates membership-based warehouse clubs offering a curated selection of merchandise at low prices. Products include groceries, electronics, appliances, clothing, and sundries, sold in bulk or large quantities. Costco also offers ancillary services such as gasoline, pharmacies, optical, food courts, and travel services. Revenue is generated through merchandise sales and membership fees from individual and business members.
